/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../../bin/libmtmd.0.0.6.dylib -install_name @rpath/libmtmd.0.dylib CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/mtmd.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/mtmd-audio.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/mtmd-helper.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/clip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/cogvlm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/conformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/glm4v.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/internvl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/kimivl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/llama4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/llava.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/minicpmv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/pixtral.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/qwen2vl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/qwen3vl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/siglip.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/whisper-enc.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/mobilenetv5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/models/youtuvl.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ander.alvarez/dev/perso/turboquant-cpu/llama.cpp/build-arm-turboquant/bin ../../bin/libllama.0.0.6.dylib ../../bin/libggml.0.9.5.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.9.5.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.5.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.9.5.dylib
